questions.label: Why is this my week strategy?
questions.response_template: Explain weekly_strategy_label using readiness_status, trigger_reason, and progression_focus.

questions.label: Why did volume change?
questions.response_template: Explain volume_mode and volume_adjustment_pct in plain language.

questions.label: What does low data mean?
questions.response_template: Explain data_quality_flag and the minimum logging threshold.

questions.label: What should I focus on for this movement?
Why is this exercise here?
questions.response_template: Explain slot role and split logic.

questions.label: Can I swap this for a dumbbell version?
questions.response_template: Check candidate substitutions filtered to dumbbell-compatible options.

questions.label: Why can’t this be swapped?
questions.response_template: Explain slot lock, equipment limits, or empty candidate list.

questions.label: How do I improve coaching accuracy?
questions.response_template: Point to logging consistency, days logged, and recovery entries.

questions.label: What counts as a completed workout?
questions.response_template: Explain the workout completed input and its downstream impact.

questions.label: Why did calories stay the same?
How does recovery affect this workout?
What should I do on a deload week?
How are workouts built?
questions.response_template: Explain deterministic split templates + exercise library + Sheets engine.

questions.label: Why isn’t this random?
questions.response_template: Explain fixed slot structure, filtering, and substitution order.
